jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Docplexus
jsonLd.description:
Docplexus invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Docplexus:
Docplexus is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Docplexus!
